raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because American Express has denied my fraud claim twice for a total of {$12000.00} in unauthorized charges. 

These charges were made by a supplementary cardholder who used my card information without my permission. This individual created and used a XXXX account solely to make unauthorized transactions on my card. I did not authorize, know about, or benefit from these charges. 

I submitted : A full police report A written statement Supporting documents and account statements Despite this, American Express closed my case and refused to refund the fraudulent charges, even though this is clearly intentional misuse and unauthorized use of my account. 

I am requesting CFPB assistance to require American Express to : XXXX. Reopen my case XXXX. Refund the full {$12000.00} XXXX. Provide a proper explanation for denying my claim despite the police report and evidence This is causing severe financial harm, and American Express has not followed proper fraud investigation procedures.
